extraction.one_line_summary: BARDET Roman won from an 18-rider breakaway 9+ minutes clear, taking mountain points to claim KOM jersey on final Cat 1 climb.
tactical_patterns: BARDET Roman attacked for KOM points on first climb then saved energy for stage win, double objective execution.
18-rider breakaway given 10+ minutes suggests peloton accepted stage giveaway day before harder mountain stage tomorrow.
LOPEZ Miguel Angel attacked GC group on final climb solo, gaining ~20 seconds before ROGLIC Primoz late acceleration reduced gap.
EIKEN Odd Christian survived as red jersey holder riding at back of GC group, Jumbo-Visma controlled without overcommitting.

rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: Sprinted for KOM points early then stayed in break to win stage, showing both tactical awareness and recovery to finish climb.
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: Only GC contender to attack decisively on final climb, gaining time on ROGLIC despite late chase reducing margin.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Late acceleration clawed back most of LOPEZ's advantage but didn't chase full gas, preserving energy for tomorrow.
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: positive: Defended red jersey hanging at back of GC group on Cat 1 finish despite team lacking mountain support.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Did heavy lifting for Jumbo-Visma on final climb after long effort, enabling ROGLIC's late acceleration.
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: negative: Struggled near back of 18-rider breakaway on climb despite Olympic MTB form, positioning cost stage chance.
